channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Blood on the Clocktower (Part 2)
item.description:
The townsfolk of Ravenswood Bluff must hurry and find the secret Sam before it kills them all.

Duration: 51:05

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, chris grace, ally beardsley, amy vorpahl, waleed mansour, david cyr kerns, alexis rhiannon, demi adejuyigbe, tao yang, kate elliott, rekha shankar, ify nwadiwe

item.title: Blood on the Clocktower (Part 1)
item.description:
Chris Grace and friends play Blood on the Clocktower and try to find the demon amongst themselves.

Duration: 47:17

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, chris grace, ally beardsley, amy vorpahl, waleed mansour, david cyr kerns, alexis rhiannon, demi adejuyigbe, tao yang, kate elliott, rekha shankar, ify nwadiwe

item.title: Liar's Dice and Farkle
item.description:
The cast of Dimension 20: The Seven become pirates and play the dice games Liar’s Dice and Farkle.

Duration: 48:30

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, aabria iyengar, erika ishii, izzy roland, persephone valentine, rekha shankar
